name: conduit-playwright-typescript-automation
description: Playwright TypeScript Conduit automation. Most test:all:* and test:dev:chrome|firefox:* suite scripts set DYNAMIC_USER=true (new signup every run). Use test:all:{dev|qa|uat}:headed:parallel:fixed for DYNAMIC_USER=false with .env credentials. Max 8 workers; settings phase uses 1 worker.

scripts.precommit:check: npm run prepare && npm run format && npm run lint
scripts.test:all:headed:serial: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=false WORKERS=1 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:all:headed:parallel: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:all:dev:headed:parallel:fixed: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=false BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:all:qa:headed:parallel:fixed: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=QA DYNAMIC_USER=false BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:all:uat:headed:parallel:fixed: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=UAT DYNAMIC_USER=false BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:all:headless:serial: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=true PARALLEL=false WORKERS=1 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:all:headless:parallel: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=true PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:all:firefox:headed:serial: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopFirefox HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=false WORKERS=1 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:all:firefox:headed:parallel: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopFirefox HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:all:firefox:headless:serial: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopFirefox HEADLESS=true PARALLEL=false WORKERS=1 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:all:firefox:headless:parallel: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopFirefox HEADLESS=true PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:dev:chrome:headed:serial: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=false WORKERS=1 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:dev:chrome:headed:parallel: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:dev:chrome:headless:serial: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=true PARALLEL=false WORKERS=1 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:dev:chrome:headless:parallel: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=true PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:dev:firefox:headed:serial: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopFirefox HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=false WORKERS=1 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:dev:firefox:headed:parallel: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopFirefox HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:dev:firefox:headless:serial: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopFirefox HEADLESS=true PARALLEL=false WORKERS=1 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:dev:firefox:headless:parallel: cross-env ALL_TEST_RUN_DIRECT=1 ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopFirefox HEADLESS=true PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 bash all-test-run.sh
scripts.test:dev:api: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=DEV TEST_TYPE=api DYNAMIC_USER=true npx playwright test --project=api
scripts.test:dev:api:parallel: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=DEV TEST_TYPE=api DYNAMIC_USER=true PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 npx playwright test --project=api
scripts.test:dev:api:serial: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=DEV TEST_TYPE=api DYNAMIC_USER=true PARALLEL=false npx playwright test --project=api
scripts.test:dev:e2e:chrome: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 npx playwright test --project=e2e --grep-invert=@E2ESettings
scripts.test:dev:e2e:chrome:headed:serial: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=false npx playwright test --project=e2e --grep-invert=@E2ESettings

scripts.test:dev:e2e:chrome:headless:serial: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=true PARALLEL=false npx playwright test --project=e2e --grep-invert=@E2ESettings
scripts.test:dev:e2e:chrome:headless:parallel: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=true PARALLEL=true WORKERS=8 npx playwright test --project=e2e --grep-invert=@E2ESettings
scripts.test:dev:e2e:chrome:ui: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome PARALLEL=false HEADLESS=false npx playwright test --project=e2e --grep-invert=@E2ESettings --workers=1 --ui
scripts.test:dev:e2e:chrome:settings: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome PARALLEL=false HEADLESS=false OPEN_REPORTS=false npx playwright test tests/e2e-tests/settings/test-e2e-update-user-settings.spec.ts --project=e2e --workers=1
scripts.test:dev:e2e:chrome:settings:headless: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome PARALLEL=false HEADLESS=true OPEN_REPORTS=false npx playwright test tests/e2e-tests/settings/test-e2e-update-user-settings.spec.ts --project=e2e --workers=1
scripts.test:dev:e2e:chrome:settings:ui: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome PARALLEL=false HEADLESS=false npx playwright test tests/e2e-tests/settings/test-e2e-update-user-settings.spec.ts --project=e2e --workers=1 --ui
scripts.test:qa:api: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=QA TEST_TYPE=api DYNAMIC_USER=true npx playwright test --project=api
scripts.test:qa:e2e:chrome: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=QA DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome npx playwright test --project=e2e
scripts.test:uat:api: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=UAT TEST_TYPE=api DYNAMIC_USER=true npx playwright test --project=api
scripts.test:uat:e2e:chrome: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=UAT DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome npx playwright test --project=e2e
scripts.test:debug: cross-env ENVIRONMENT=DEV DYNAMIC_USER=true BROWSER=DesktopChrome HEADLESS=false PARALLEL=false npx playwright test --debug --project=e2e

author: Md Sakibur Rahman
